title: VeloraOS 1.10.13 - Chat Stability Hotfix
releaseNotes: Fixes Internal Server Error for existing chats that still reference legacy model IDs.
Normalizes stale and unknown model selections into the new Automatic/Tiny/Quick/Deep Thoughts profiles safely.
Stops background polling from rebuilding the entire Chat page every 2.5 seconds.
Tightens mobile and desktop Chat viewport/scroll containment to eliminate lifting and jumping.
Preserves model intelligence, background jobs, HTTPS, PWA support, accounts, licensing and secure rollback updates.
